data.title: 3D Scanning & Printing Demo Day in NYC on Nov. 5th by Direct Dimensions & CAD BLU - free event for engineers and designers.
data.description: On November 5th, a free interactive event in New York will showcase the latest 3D technology to engineers, designers, and makers. Direct Dimensions, Inc., known for their expertise in 3D scanning and modeling, is partnering with CAD for this cutting-edge initiative. The event aims to educate participants on the innovative solutions in digital measurement. Mark your calendars for this opportunity on November 5th in New York.

data.title: AI data center stock rose 19% as earnings doubled, surpassing estimates, reaching new high early Friday.
data.description: In the third quarter, Comfort Systems reported a significant increase in earnings, more than doubling from the previous period and surpassing expectations. The company's AI data center venture experienced a substantial surge, reaching a new peak at the beginning of the week. This resulted in an impressive 19% increase in value. The performance of the AI data center play highlights the company's strong financial position and growth potential.

data.title: Google Cloud's momentum strengthens with Anthropic deal before Q3 earnings. Investors consider Google stock potential.
data.description: As investors consider the potential growth of Google stock, the focus is increasingly turning towards its cloud computing division. The recent Anthropic deal has added to the momentum of Google Cloud, reinforcing its prospects before the Q3 earnings report. This raises the question - Is Google Stock a worthwhile investment?

data.title: Focus on passion over profit, prioritize purpose over paychecks. Job for money, calling for meaning. "Find Your Passion — Not Just A Job — And Money Will Follow" - emphasis on purpose.
data.description: Distinguishing between a job and a calling is crucial. While a job is done primarily for financial gain, a calling is pursued for its purpose, with money being a secondary consideration. It is important to identify one's passion and purpose in order to find fulfillment. This advice is emphasized in an article titled "Find Your Passion — Not Just A Job — And Money Will Follow." This guidance suggests that prioritizing purpose can lead to financial success.

data.title: nugs' Halloween livestream lineup includes four nights featuring Goose, String Cheese Incident, Billy Strings, and Widespread Panic Pay-Per-Views.
data.description: Nugs will be streaming Hulaween, a four-night event from Oct. 30 to Nov. 2, showcasing performances from bands like Goose and The String Cheese Incident. The lineup also includes exclusive shows by artists such as Billy Strings. Additionally, there will be Pay-Per-View concerts by Widespread Panic. This Halloween lineup promises an exciting musical experience for viewers. The event will be available for livestreaming through nugs, a prominent source for live music content.

data.title: Women are in perimenopause stage each year with 2 million entering and 1.3 million entering menopause. Aware in October.
data.description: In honor of Menopause Awareness Month in October, it is crucial to understand the essential stages of women's health and the discrepancies in medical attention. According to recent data from Seattle dated October 24, 2025, around 2 million women in the U.S. transition into perimenopause yearly, with another 1.3 million reaching...

data.title: SuperX and Chengtian Weiye form joint venture SuperX Cooltech for AI liquid cooling solutions.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, SuperX AI Technology Limited (NASDAQ: SUPX) made public its definitive agreement with the Hong Kong subsidiary of Shenzhen Chengtian Weiye Technology Co., Ltd. This agreement signifies a significant partnership that will undoubtedly impact the tech industry.

data.title: Zelle parent company Early Warning expands $1T payments network internationally with stablecoin initiative.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Early Warning Services, the parent company of Zelle®, disclosed plans to extend the ease and security that consumers appreciate in their banking app to cross-border payments. The initiative, revealed in New York on October 24, 2025, aims to leverage Zelle's network to enhance the efficiency and safety of international money transfers. By implementing this initiative, Early Warning Services seeks to offer consumers a seamless experience when sending funds across borders, mirroring the simplicity and protection already enjoyed within their banking applications.

data.title: Sacramento Smog Test & Repair expands services to offer oil changes in Orangevale, CA, starting on Oct. 24, 2025.
data.description: In Orangevale, California, on October 24, 2025, Sacramento Smog Test & Repair, a reputable STAR-certified facility for smog checks and auto repairs in the greater Sacramento region, has unveiled a significant enhancement to their services. They have introduced professional oil changes, alongside their existing offerings, ensuring quick and efficient maintenance.

data.title: Zoomlion hits milestone with 5,000th power battery pack produced, introduces new energy components portfolio.
data.description: In Changsha, China on October 24, 2025, Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science & Technology Co., Ltd. (1157.HK) celebrated the production of its 5,000th power battery pack. The event took place as the company introduced a fresh range of essential new energy components, demonstrating its dedication to innovation and progress in the field.

data.title: CPI inflation data gives Fed room for more cuts, new vehicle prices not inflated by Trump tariffs.
data.description: The current prices of new vehicles have not seen an increase due to the tariffs imposed by the Trump administration. Despite this, recent Consumer Price Index (CPI) data indicates a stable inflation rate, giving the Federal Reserve the opportunity to consider further interest rate cuts. This information was covered in a live report by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: New book emphasizes reclamation of humanity in medicine; titled "Between Heartbeats and Algorithms."
data.description: In a recent announcement from the American Association for Physician Leadership (AAPL) on Oct. 24, 2025, a new book titled "Between Heartbeats and Algorithms: Reclaiming What Matters in Healthcare" has been launched. The book is penned by Devjit Roy, a prominent physician leader and healthcare executive. The publication aims to shed light on important issues in the healthcare sector, emphasizing the fusion of human compassion with data-driven technologies. This unveiling marks a significant milestone in the efforts to address the challenges and opportunities facing healthcare today.

data.title: Envision Energy wins “AI for Sustainability Excellence” at Reuters Global Sustainability Awards 2025.
data.description: In London on October 24, 2025, Envision Energy, a prominent player in eco-friendly technology, received prestigious accolades at the Reuters Global Sustainability Awards 2025. They clinched the top spot in the "AI for Sustainability Excellence" division for their innovative use of artificial intelligence.

data.title: Deckers Outdoor Corp beat Q2 earnings with $1.82 EPS; revenue hit $1.43 billion, exceeding estimates. They forecast $6.30-$6.39 EPS and $5.35 billion revenue.
data.description: Deckers Outdoor Corp. (NYSE: DECK) exceeded expectations in their second-quarter earnings report. They reported earnings of $1.82 per share, surpassing the estimated $1.57 by 16%. Quarterly revenue was $1.43 billion, above the expected $1.41 billion. Deckers anticipates fiscal GAAP EPS between $6.30 to $6.39, compared to the estimated $6.28 EPS, and revenue of $5.35 billion, rather than the expected $5.45 billion. The company highlighted double-digit growth in the second quarter for their brands HOKA and UGG, driven by strong performance and international expansion. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
